title: Senior Revenue Manager at Accor India

jsonLd.title: Senior Revenue Manager at Accor India
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Revenue Manager with drive and ambition, Accor India in Meerut is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Accor India:
Accor India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Deliver exceptional guest experiences in line with brand standards
• Coordinate housekeeping and maintenance for room readiness
• Ensure compliance with FSSAI, health, and safety regulations
• Conduct regular guest satisfaction surveys and implement improvements
• Manage procurement of hotel supplies and control operating costs
• Develop and maintain relationships with corporate clients
• Manage front office operations including check-in/check-out

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Travel Management
• Proficiency in Barista Skills
• Proficiency in F&B Service
• Proficiency in Opera PMS
• Proficiency in Event Management
• Proficiency in Revenue Management
• Proficiency in GDS Systems
• Proficiency in PMS Systems

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Meerut, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Accor India!
